subject: A pale robed figure holding a goblet and a blade stands elevated above a crowd of reaching supplicants
description: A pale, bald humanoid figure stands at the center of the composition, elevated above a crowd of similarly bald, dark-robed figures who press forward from below with arms and hands outstretched and reaching upward. The central figure wears elaborate red and gold armor or robes with a high ornate collar and a crown-like headdress. In the right hand they hold a slender blade; in the left, a small round goblet. The crowd's reaching hands fill the lower half of the image. Heavy red curtains frame the background. The scene is lit from above, giving the central figure a staged, theatrical presence. The card is a named legendary creature and the figure's design is the canonical Cabal liturgist.
foreground: Pale bald figure in red-gold robes holding blade and goblet; crowd of reaching supplicant hands below
emotion: cold authority; the figure is impassive above the desperate supplication of the crowd
